name: First Federal Savings and Loan Association
description_short: FDIC-insured savings and loan institution in Ohio offering personal banking, real estate loans, and business services across multiple locations.
description_long: First Federal Savings and Loan Association is a federally insured financial institution operating primarily in central Ohio with locations in Newark, Gahanna, Granville, Heath, and Pataskala. The institution emphasizes community banking with FDIC insurance backing all deposits. First Federal provides a comprehensive suite of personal and commercial banking products, including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), money market accounts, IRAs, credit cards, and real estate financing. They offer residential home loans, refinancing, home construction loans, and home equity lines of credit, along with business checking and merchant services. The company distinguishes itself through community-focused programs including a down payment grant program offering up to $20,000 toward qualifying home purchases and closing costs, plus no-cost financial coaching led by certified counselors available to community members regardless of account status. Their lending team emphasizes personalized service and local decision-making for real estate transactions. However, the institution appears to have limited geographic footprint compared to national banks, and several service request forms on their website show "closed to new submissions," suggesting capacity constraints or seasonal service limitations. The company targets both individual consumers and small business owners seeking relationship-based banking with emphasis on homeownership support and financial education.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government full faith and credit
Down payment grant program providing up to $20,000 for eligible home buyers toward down payments and closing costs
Free financial coaching from certified counselors available to community members without account requirement
Multiple location options across central Ohio (7 locations including loan production office)
Offers both residential and commercial real estate lending with experienced team
Comprehensive product suite including CDs, IRAs, money market accounts, business checking, and merchant services
Online account application and information request capabilities
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted primarily to central Ohio, unsuitable for out-of-state customers
Multiple service request forms on website marked "closed to new submissions," indicating potential service gaps or capacity issues
Website does not display specific interest rates, APYs, fees, or loan terms for product comparison
No clear information about online banking features, mobile app availability, or digital service capabilities
Job application form also shows as closed, suggesting possible operational limitations
best_for: Ohio residents seeking home purchase financing with down payment assistance through grant programs
Small business owners in central Ohio needing business checking and merchant services from a local institution
Homeowners interested in refinancing or home equity products with personalized local lending teams
Community members wanting free financial coaching and education without pressure to open accounts
diagnosis: First Federal Savings is best for Ohio residents seeking relationship-based community banking with emphasis on homeownership support and free financial education. Primary caveat: extremely limited geographic availability (central Ohio only) makes them unsuitable for out-of-state customers, and multiple closed service forms on their website suggest operational constraints that may affect service availability and responsiveness.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: First Federal Savings and Loan Association
